content.en:
It didn't take long for Ye Tian to successfully fuse the Exemption Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment, and at the same time, he also fused the Ice River Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment.

After obtaining the exemption from the Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment, coupled with the fact that he had an Immortal Perfection-level Ancestral Endowment, the combination of these two Perfect-level Ancestral Endowments was enough for Ye Tian to swallow the Medium Perfect Treasure without falling, and he could even forcibly suppress the Medium Perfection Treasure.

"Swallow!"

Ye Tian swallowed this medium-perfect exotic lotus into his body, and at the same time urged the exemption of the perfect-level ancestral endowment and the immortal perfect-level ancestral endowment.

With these two perfection-level ancestral endowments, Ye Tian's controlled body resisted the power explosion of the medium perfect treasure.

Now.

Ye Tian felt that the power of the medium perfect treasure was constantly eroding his controlling body, but exempting the perfect-level ancestor would transfer most of the damage to the surrounding time and space, and the immortal perfect-level ancestor would ensure that his controlled body would not shatter.

Coupled with other means, Ye Tian suppressed the medium perfect treasure at this time, and there was no clue from the appearance.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

In this way, this medium perfect treasure is your own!

With his half-step perfect master's realm, he was able to obtain a medium perfect treasure, and his luck was simply too good.

Although the highest high-level perfection treasure can be found in the Zhendao Alien Realm, it is a treasure that can only be taken away by the perfect master, and he can not take it now, even if he is exempted from the perfection-level ancestral endowment and the immortal perfection-level ancestral endowment together, he can't withstand the power erosion of the high-level perfection treasure, and it will turn into ashes in an instant.

Time passed slowly, and the time for an eternal year was almost up.

Finally on this day, Ye Tian was ostracized by the Zhendao Alien Realm.

......

"It's out!"

Ye Tian sensed the medium perfect treasure in his body, and after confirming that it was correct, he breathed a sigh of relief.

Subsequently, Ye Tian returned to the capital of the bloody war.

After he returned, no one came to him, and the Lord of Xuanhuang did not come to ask him how he had gained.

After all, this is a welfare package that belongs to the top ten on the blood battle list, and everything that can be found belongs to him, and the perfect controller will not come to ask Ye Tian about his harvest privately.

From the point of view of the perfect controller, a half-step perfect controller like Ye Tian and them will bring back a low-level perfect treasure at most, and it is unlikely that they will be able to obtain a medium-level perfect treasure.

In the following days, Ye Tian's will clone was mainly to practice the changes in the Dao Yun Sea to comprehend the changes in the path of enlightenment, and strive to master the changes in the path of enlightenment to three or three billion, so as to form a perfect imprint.

In that case, he would be able to refine and control this medium-perfect treasure.

And after Ye Tian inquired, he also knew what the purple-gold liquid substance was, it was the purple gold Dao liquid, which came from the purple gold dao tree, and it was a very precious cultivation resource.

The Purple Gold Dao Liquid can help assist the impact control chain, and it is one of the best treasures for the auxiliary impact control chain, which is extremely rare.

"Great, with these Purple Gold Dao Liquids, I can easily break the chains of control one by one. Moreover, I also have the Purple Gold Dao Tree, after planting it in a special environment, it can still be reborn in the long years. "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to absorb the purple gold Dao liquid to impact and break the chain of control.

Click!!

One control chain after another was broken by Ye Tian, originally Ye Tian broke less than two hundred control chains, but with the help of Zijin Dao Liquid, he easily broke many control chains.

The years passed, and before he knew it, Ye Tian broke six hundred chains of control.

However, having broken so many chains of control, there was still no transformation, so Ye Tian's strength had not increased too much, but it was not small.

Time passed slowly, and before you knew it, nearly eight hundred eternal years had passed.

On this day, Ye Tian finally mastered the changes of the path of enlightenment to three and three billion, forming the perfect mark of the path of enlightenment.

"The Path of Enlightenment Perfection Mark is complete, it's time to refine this medium perfect treasure!"

Immediately.

Ye Tian began to use the Enlightenment Perfection Mark to assist in refining this medium Perfection Mark.

Not long after, Ye Tian initially refined the Medium Perfect Mark, and also knew the name and function of this Medium Perfect Mark.

"Enlightened White Lotus!"

The function of the Enlightenment White Lotus is to assist in the changes of the Enlightenment Path, deduce and improve the secret arts, etc., that is to say, this Enlightenment White Lotus is a medium-perfect treasure that assists in cultivation.

"It's actually an auxiliary practice, which is too valuable for an individual!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

To a certain extent, the value of this Enlightenment White Lotus is not lower than that of ordinary high-level perfect treasures, and it is also one of the perfect treasures he wants the most.

"Hahaha, with this Enlightenment White Lotus, I'm afraid I can easily master the changes of one Seed Dao to three or three billion kinds, so as to master the Perfect Seal. Moreover, I can easily grasp my own Endless Dao changes to three or three billion. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

If you want to increase the changes of your own path to 3.3 billion kinds, it is more than ten times more difficult than contemplating other paths to form a perfect imprint, after all, the changes of other paths can be followed, and you can practice step by step, while the changes of your own path require a little bit of enlightenment and practice, which is much more difficult.

This is also the reason why other half-step perfect masters need to form a perfect imprint on the other doorways before they can comprehend the changes in their own paths.

But now that he has the Enlightenment Dao White Lotus, Ye Tian doesn't have to worry about the perfect imprint of his Dao.

In the days that followed, with the help of the Enlightenment Dao White Lotus, coupled with the assistance of Dao Yunhai, his progress speed was too terrifying, and he easily mastered a doorway to three or three billion changes, forming a perfect mark.

The years passed, and in the blink of an eye, Ye Tian had been practicing in the Dao Yun Sea for five thousand eternal years.

And at this moment, he had mastered thirty-six perfect seals.

And, his chains of control broke a thousand.

On the whole, Ye Tian's strength has greatly improved, and he is powerful among the top half-step controllers!

Looking at the blood battle list again, Ye Tian has already reached the second place in the blood battle list, and he is not far from the first place in the blood battle list.

At this moment, the high-level leaders of the Blood War Capital began to be jealous of Ye Tian.

Anyone knows that there is almost a 100% probability that Ye Tian will become the perfect controller, unless Ye Tian falls halfway.

But.

Ye Tian is a member of the Daoless Tower, as long as Ye Tian does not die, the Daoless Tower is enough to ensure that Ye Tian will not fall.

Now.

The high-level leaders of the Wudao Tower are very happy, after all, the Wudao Tower has an extra demon genius, this is the luck of the Wudao Tower!

In the following days, Ye Tian entered the other treasures of the Blood War Capital, and used them one by one to improve his strength.

He wants to hit the first place on the bloody battle list within 10,000 eternal years!
